chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – The making up for the Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/313)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/313)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ قَضَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فِي ذِي الْحِجَّةِ أَ وَ أَقْطَعُهُ قَالَ اقْضِهِ فِي ذِي الْحِجَّةِ وَ اقْطَعْهُ إِنْ شِئْتَ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from someone else, from Aban, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about making up for a Month of Ramazan during Zil Hijja, or can I cut it piece-meal?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Make up for it in Zil Hijja, and cut it if you so desire to’.
en.sarwar: 5. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from more than one person from Aban from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about making Qada’ (compensatory fast) of fast of the month of Ramadan in the month of Dhul al-Hajjah and to discontinue it. He (the Imam) said, ‘You can make its Qada’ (compensatory fast) in Dhul al-Hajjah and discontinue if you like.’”
